metadata.description: Skill-based CustomGPT.ai plugin for Claude Code — semantic search, agent management, and RAG workflows. No runtime dependencies required.

plugins.name: customgpt-skill-plugin
plugins.description: Semantic search for your codebase using CustomGPT.ai. Fully skill-based — no Node.js, no Python, no dependencies. Requires only curl (pre-installed on macOS, Linux, Windows 10+).
